title: Kotlin
description: This plugin adds the Kotlin libraries to your Minecraft server, enabling proper support for Plugins developed with Kotlin
body:
# ![Kotlin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSjncduv/images/2578ad2c0f45d6c68537bb210c289cf224e47fb8.png)

This plugin adds Kotlin libraries to your Minecraft server.
Now you can run Plugins, developed with the Kotlin Programming Language, without having to bring the libraries on your own.

**NOTE! Kotlin, the libraries, and the Logo belong to JetBrains, this only adds the Libraries to your server!**
